source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-prime-api

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: Header authentication key (partner_key). x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.

parameters.name: prime
parameters.description: The one-time token returned from getPrime. Expires after 90 seconds. If using Apple Pay Deferred Payments, keep prime yourself (default duration 30 days). Test prime can be used in sandbox.

parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: merchant_id
parameters.description: Involved merchant's identifier as defined on Portal.

parameters.name: merchant_group_id
parameters.description: Merchant management settings set on the portal; transactions performed according to the portal's payment configuration. Cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, transaction price should be times 100 (e.g. HKD1 = 100). See reference for each foreign currency's transaction limit. When using AFTEE, max amount is NT$9,999,999.

parameters.name: merchandise_details
parameters.description: Item amount or points excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code, e.g. TWD.

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. May be customized but must be unique. Strongly recommended to define unique bank_transaction_id to avoid error 421: gateway time out.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Item description. Required for PCI compliance; forwarded by TapPay if acquirer supports. Required by some acquirers; if omitted the transaction may fail.

parameters.name: cardholder
parameters.description: Information of the cardholder (see Cardholder schema). Feeds Fraud Detector and 3-D Secure risk verification.

parameters.name: cardholder_verify
parameters.description: Authentication (KYC) fields (see CardholderVerify schema). Supported: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: kyc_verification_merchant_id
parameters.description: Merchant id that can only do authentication except authorization. Support Industry: property and life insurance / electronic payment.

parameters.name: instalment
parameters.description: Number of intervals of payments. Default 0. Support: Taishin Bank, National Credit Card Center of R.O.C., NewebPay, Cathay United Bank, E.SUN BANK, CTBC BANK, globalpayments, UNION BANK OF TAIWAN. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: delay_capture_in_days
parameters.description: Days between bank authorization and actual capture. Default 0. Use -1 to disable automatic capture (self-capture).

parameters.name: three_domain_secure
parameters.description: Enable 3D Secure authentication. Default false. Only applicable to Direct Pay.

parameters.name: result_url
parameters.description: Transaction result notification URL object (see ResultUrl schema). Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions (when three_domain_secure = true).

parameters.name: redeem
parameters.description: Whether to use the redeem. Support: National Credit Card Center of R.O.C. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: remember
parameters.description: Whether to store this payment method. If true, response returns card_secret (card_key and card_token) for future Pay by Card Token transactions. Supported for Direct Pay and some e-payments with binding support.

parameters.name: additional_data
parameters.description: Data encrypted and decrypted for other customization requirements.

parameters.name: event_code
parameters.description: Code defined by the bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

parameters.name: product_image_url
parameters.description: Picture of the store or product on the pay page. Same feature as line_pay_product_image_url; if both set, product_image_url is used.

parameters.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy
parameters.description: JKOPAY insurance details of property and life insurance transaction (see JkoPayInsurancePolicy schema). Support: JKOPAY.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Store branch ID. Forwarded if supported by acquirer.

parameters.name: store_name
parameters.description: Store name. Forwarded if supported by acquirer.

request.description: JSON body. Header: Content-Type: application/json, x-api-key: YourPartnerKey. Sandbox https://sandbox.tappaysdk.com/tpc/payment/pay-by-prime ; Production https://prod.tappaysdk.com/tpc/payment/pay-by-prime

responses.description: Transaction result JSON; status=0 indicates success. HTTP status code not stated by source (200 assumed for success).
responses.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Prime API Response
